actionCalls.description: Notify UI Path of Record Creation
actionCalls.name: Create_Queue_Notification_for_UI_Path
actionCalls.label: Create Queue Notification for UI Path

assignments.description: Collect Candidate IDs and Store them in the List
assignments.name: Collect_Candidates
assignments.label: Collect Candidates

assignments.description: Collect Existing Contact IDs in the list
assignments.name: Collect_Existing_Contact_ID
assignments.label: Collect Existing Contact ID

assignments.description: Collect All Requisition IDs in a list of variables
assignments.name: Collect_Requisition_ID
assignments.label: Collect Requisition ID

value.stringValue: Randstad Digital Talent Center Pvt Ltd

assignments.description: Set the Error to False during initialization
assignments.name: Set_Contact_Is_Error_False
assignments.label: Set Contact Is Error False

decisions.description: Do Candidate Exists that needs to sent to Oracle
decisions.name: Candidate_List_Blank
decisions.label: Candidate List Blank ?

decisions.description: Check if First Name, Email & Salary Exists
decisions.name: Contact_Fields_Exist
decisions.label: Contact Fields Exist

Flow.description: Create Requisition Record from Job and Placed Candidate. Invokes UI Path to dispatch the details to Oracle Certain fields are not displayed and sent as is.

formulas.name: ConcatCityStateAndCountry

Flow.label: Create Requisition

loops.description: Iterate over the application records and collect Candidate Ids
loops.name: Iterate_Applications
loops.label: Iterate Applications

recordLookups.description: Get Requisitions Related to the Job
recordLookups.name: Get_Requisitions
recordLookups.label: Get Requisitions

recordLookups.description: Get Details for the Current Selected Job ID
recordLookups.name: Job
recordLookups.label: Job

screens.name: Create_Requisition_Screen
screens.label: Create Requisition

fields.name: lblInstructions
fields.fieldText:
﻿Select placed candidates on the job {!Job.Name} to generate offer letters.

First Name, Last Name, Email, Current Salary, Tentative DOJ are required

fields.name: lblContactError
fields.fieldText: First Name, Last Name, Email, Salary, Tentative DOJ are required for all selected candidates.

fields.name: Job_Details
fields.fieldText: All fields are required. Change the values on Job if this is not accurate or unavailable.

fields.name: Default_Value
fields.fieldText:
Default Values for System fields. Normally should be used as is.

Please confirm with the manager if you wish to change the defaults

screens.helpText:
Create a requisition record, which is pushed to Oracle for offer generation.


To prevent duplicate offers being generated for the same candidate, the system checks if the candidate has been attached to the requisition record before.


To regenerate an offer for the same candidate on the job, please delete the previous requisition record

screens.name: Existing_Requisitions_Screen
screens.label: Existing Requisitions

fields.name: lblError
fields.fieldText: ⚠️ No candidate record available for creating a new requisition.

screens.helpText: Existing Requisitions that are associated with the job

variables.description: Validate All Contacts have First Name, Last Name, Email and Current Salary
variables.name: isContactError

variables.description: Should the default values be displayed
variables.name: isDisplayDefault

variables.description: List of Existing Contact ID attached to the Requisition
variables.name: lstExistingContactID

variables.description: Record ID which will be passed In
variables.name: recordId
